inference_source: WM-6 sprint execution — confirms mis-targeted RS-R6 seed link
evidence_refs: WM-6 REQ-STG-001 correction: the existing TRC-REQ-STG-001-TO-RSP-STG link (skill-derived) targeted the seed abstraction RSP-STG-SEED rather than a concrete manifestation. Confirmed manifestation is StageProvider.tsx which owns: shared StageContext (selectedNodeIds, expandedNodeIds, focusedNodeId, isolatedNodeIds, isPresentationActive, view, activeWeek, position); all view renderers (Kanban/Weekly/Monthly) are children inside StageProvider; navigation, edge scroll, island layout response, and context preservation all live here. Affected_modules in the requirement referenced 'StageManager.tsx' (v0.1.x path) — current equivalent is StageProvider + StageCore.
